## SoundsGood VERSION

### Highlights

-
-
-

### Install

```bash
flatpak remote-add --user --if-not-exists soundsgood https://n1ghthill.github.io/soundsgood/soundsgood.flatpakrepo
flatpak install --user soundsgood io.github.n1ghthill.soundsgood
flatpak run io.github.n1ghthill.soundsgood
```

### Update

```bash
flatpak update --user io.github.n1ghthill.soundsgood
```

### Validation

- [ ] Python compile passed.
- [ ] Unit tests passed.
- [ ] Meson build and tests passed.
- [ ] AppStream and desktop metadata validated.
- [ ] Flatpak build tested.
- [ ] `scripts/generate-assets.sh` was run after version or screenshot changes.
- [ ] Release bundle assets were uploaded.

### Assets

- Release card: `docs/assets/soundsgood-release-card.png`
- Social preview: `docs/assets/soundsgood-social-card.png`
- Hero banner: `docs/assets/soundsgood-hero.png`
